text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Grrrrr! I got my butt kicked again!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I can look an<n>Umamusume in the
face in this<n>condition...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Even though I—more than anyone<n>else—am here
trying to pay respect to<n>them.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I was all talk. I couldn't do it at all... I<n>don't even
deserve to call myself a<n>simp!
choice_data_list: So you're giving up on running with your oshis?
So you're giving up on running with your oshis?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I was all talk. I couldn't do it at all... I<n>don't even
deserve to call myself a<n>simp!
choice_data_list: So you're giving up on running with your oshis?
So you're giving up on running with your oshis?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
choice_data_list: I know how serious you are.
I know how serious you are.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Really? You think I can try my best for<n>my oshis?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Gyuh... Th-thank you! I guess I lost<n>myself there
for a moment...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
How could I ever doubt the love I<n>feel?! I'm going
to run for them! I'm<n>going to get stronger... for
them!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Because that is how I simp!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! You've helped me<n>remember
something very important!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital renews her will to fight<n>and looks
firmly to the future.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to cause any trouble... I<n>just want to
watch them from a<n>distance closer than anyone
else can<n>get!
choice_data_list: In that case, let's do our best!
In that case, let's do our best!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
choice_data_list:
As long as you have that fiery passion, you'll
definitely be okay!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Fiery... passion... That's right! If<n>nothing else, I
have absolute<n>confidence in this fire burning in my
heart!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I'm gonna run until I burn<n>out in a
blaze of glory!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But even then, my ashes will take to<n>the wind so I
can chase my oshis to<n>the ends of the Earth!
